calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bawi Kwan is present.
Attorney Patrick Currin appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eduardo Siqueiros is present.
Attorney Laura Keenan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Sep-10-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Off Calendar
